summary: EXP-495 authored: 3 find-replace patches consolidate the Sydney–Perth internal-disagreement arithmetic (3,893/4,352/460) out of part6 STEELMAN-01 body and part7 §7.1 body+TLDR, replacing with cross-references to the §2.9 canonical hub. PARTIAL OVERRIDE: 4,352 km retained in STEELMAN-01 headline (the dome's ranked-#1 claim — removing it would gut the steelman). All three target strings verified unique within their section. review_class=verification (refinement / cross-reference threading; no new arguments).
